perturbation.original_text: Reference to Delta and FWT includes any subsidiary, affiliated or parent companies, and the directors, officers, employees, agents, representatives and contractors of the respective companies.
perturbation.changed_text: Reference to Delta and FWT only includes the specific named corporations, excluding any subsidiary, affiliated or parent companies, and only applies to the directors and officers of the respective companies.
perturbation.explanation: The original definition includes a broad range of related entities and individuals, while the modified version restricts it significantly. This is contradicting to the original intent of the contract to include a broad range of protection, because it now significantly restricts it to only apply to directors and officers of the respective companies. The change causes contradiction in defining the specific inclusion of references, as some are included and some are excluded. This will cause confusion in defining who is a party in the contract.
perturbation.contradicted_text: Both parties understand the nature and character of this Agreement, and intend for this to be a fully binding agreement. The parties may use all legal means at their disposal to enforce this Agreement. Reference to Delta and FWT only includes the specific named corporations, excluding any subsidiary, affiliated or parent companies, and only applies to the directors and officers of the respective companies. 1.1 "Period of Affiliation", as used below, refers to the period of the business relationship between the parties under the Cooperative Production Agreement dated March 10, 1997.
perturbation.justification: The original text defines 'Reference to Delta and FWT' broadly, including subsidiaries, affiliated companies, parents, and a wide range of individuals (directors, officers, employees, agents, representatives, and contractors). The changed text drastically restricts this definition to only the specific named corporations and only the directors and officers. The contradicted text uses the changed restricted definition, which directly contradicts the original broad intent. This introduces a significant contradiction, because it would significantly limit the scope of who is included within the context of that agreement. Thus, the change creates a strong in-text contradiction.

perturbation.original_text: The parties may use all legal means at their disposal to enforce this Agreement.
perturbation.changed_text: The parties may only use mediation to resolve disputes arising from this Agreement.
perturbation.explanation: This is an In-Text Contradiction that arises from changing one term/clause to another location. The original text allows for all legal means for enforcement, whereas the modified version restricts it to only mediation. This is a contradiction regarding what the parties may/may not do in the event of a breach of contract. This created in text contradiction causes confusion.
perturbation.contradicted_text: Both parties understand the nature and character of this Agreement, and intend for this to be a fully binding agreement. The parties may only use mediation to resolve disputes arising from this Agreement. Reference to Delta and FWT includes any subsidiary, affiliated or parent companies, and the directors, officers, employees, agents, representatives and contractors of the respective companies.
perturbation.justification: The original text allows for 'all legal means' to enforce the agreement, but the changed text restricts enforcement to 'only mediation'. The contradicted text, which includes the same contradictory term 'only mediation to resolve disputes', is being contradicted by the original text because the original text says, the parties may use all legal means. Therefore, the changed text, in comparison to the contradicted text, is creating a contradiction from the original text.

perturbation.original_text: Salary and compensation information is considered confidential and proprietary information, and is fully subject to the disclosure restrictions of this Agreement.
perturbation.changed_text: Salary and compensation information is considered public record and is not subject to the disclosure restrictions of this Agreement.
perturbation.explanation: The original text says that salary and compensation information is confidential, where the modified version dictates it is a public record, meaning it is not confidential. This is a direct contradiction on the parties' rights and obligations of what constitutes confidential information. The inclusion of conflicting information generates confusion in what information must be held in confidence.
perturbation.contradicted_text: Salary and compensation information is considered public record and is not subject to the disclosure restrictions of this Agreement.
perturbation.justification: The original text states salary and compensation are confidential, while the changed text states it is public record. The contradicted text also states that this information is public record. This creates a direct contradiction within the agreement regarding the confidentiality of salary and compensation information, as the change introduces language that directly conflicts with the confidentiality stated in the original text, fitting the Structural Flaws - In Text Contradiction definition.
